untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific chart pattern (descending broadening wedge with two down-sloping trend lines forming a wedge shape). This requires trend line identification and geometric pattern matching, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume/technical indicators. The wedge pattern itself is not directly translatable to indicator-based conditions. Used Bollinger Bands as a proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the true wedge geometry.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using: (1) close crossing above upper Bollinger Band to signal breakout through resistance, (2) volume below 20-period historical average to represent negligible volume at breakout, (3) ADX > 20 to confirm trend reversal context. Exit condition uses close crossing below middle Bollinger Band as a reversal signal. However, this does not authentically capture the descending broadening wedge pattern structure as described by Bulkowski.
